item.name: TC#39 - Security - SQL Injection attempt

exec: pm.test("Response does not expose SQL error", function () { var body = pm.response.text(); pm.expect(body).to.not.include("SQL"); pm.expect(body).to.not.include("syntax error"); });
pm.test("Response contains false or Fault - SQL injection rejected", function () { var body = pm.response.text(); pm.expect(body.includes("false") || body.includes("Fault")).to.be.true; });

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X POST https://webservices.daehosting.com/services/isbnservice.wso -H "Content-Type: text/xml; charset=utf-8" -H "SOAPAction: IsValidISBN13" -d "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap=\"http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/\"><soap:Body><IsValidISBN13 xmlns=\"http://webservices.daehosting.com/ISBN\"><sISBN>' OR '1'='1</sISBN></IsValidISBN13></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>"

item.name: TC#40 - Security - XSS attempt

exec: pm.test("Response does not reflect unescaped script tag", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.not.include("<script>"); });
pm.test("Response contains false or Fault - XSS input rejected", function () { var body = pm.response.text(); pm.expect(body.includes("false") || body.includes("Fault")).to.be.true; });

request.description: Generated from cURL: curl -X POST https://webservices.daehosting.com/services/isbnservice.wso -H "Content-Type: text/xml; charset=utf-8" -H "SOAPAction: IsValidISBN13" -d "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap=\"http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/\"><soap:Body><IsValidISBN13 xmlns=\"http://webservices.daehosting.com/ISBN\"><sISBN><script>alert(1)</script></sISBN></IsValidISBN13></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>"
